---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Tag Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve? Is it related
to a frustration with the current design or export behavior?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. If it's about a
specific machine or format, name the vendor/target (e.g. a new ZPL option, an
additional export format, another labeling machine).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've tried (e.g. exporting to a
standard format and post-processing).

## Additional context

Mockups, sample labels, a template `.json`, or related items from the
**Status & Roadmap** section of the [README](../../README.md).
